seo.title: NexoFilm | Audiovisual Production & Cinematic Photography
seo.description: Audiovisual production company in Buenos Aires specializing in commercial video, streaming, and photography with high-impact cinematic aesthetics.

slides.title: Cinematic Excellence
slides.subtitle: Elevating brands through high-impact visual storytelling.

slides.title: Full-Scale Production
slides.subtitle: From concept to delivery. Commercial, Streaming & Product Photography.

slides.title: Global Vision
slides.subtitle: Premium content crafted in Buenos Aires for a global audience.

history.description1: At NexoFilm, we understand that every project is an opportunity to create a powerful visual bond. We use state-of-the-art technology and precision optics to ensure sharpness and colorimetry that define the industry standard.
history.description2: Our mission transcends the technical: we are the creative bridge that unites your company's identity with narratives that excite and endure. Every frame, every streaming, and every still capture is a link in that vital connection.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected
projects.intro_text: Each frame is a unique connection.
projects.intro_strong: Join a team that makes every detail count.

value_prop.description: We blend cinematic aesthetics with business objectives. At NexoFilm, we understand that every frame must work for your brand, turning creative vision into tangible results.

01.title: Strategic Mindset
01.desc: Every audiovisual piece is born from a clear commercial objective, not just an artistic whim.

02.title: Cinema Quality in Every Frame
02.desc: We use state-of-the-art technology to ensure your brand looks at the same level as big productions.

team.title: Who We Are
team.description: NexoFilm combines the strategic vision of its leadership with a global network of elite specialists for each stage of production.

bios.martin: Creative passionate about cinematic aesthetics and brand narrative. 15 years connecting brands with high-impact visual stories.

team.culture_quote: We believe in radical collaboration. We select the best specific talent for each project, ensuring impeccable execution regardless of complexity.

01.title: Planning
01.desc: Storytelling concept, script or technical lighting and connectivity plan.

02.title: Capture
02.desc: On-set production, photo session or live signal deployment.

03.title: Optimization
03.desc: Post-production, digital image retouching or real-time bitrate monitoring.

04.title: Final Nexus
04.desc: Delivery of a high-impact piece or a seamless broadcast for your audience.

items.t1: Martin is the best in Latam… His predisposition, creativity, kindness, and closeness make him unique in his profession. He has done numerous jobs with us and they have always been 10/10. I totally recommend him and we would choose him 100 times… Thanks @MartinMagariños
items.t2: Martin Magariños is a great professional, I was fortunate to work with him during my time at Visit Lauderdale and The Palm Beaches- Tourism Organizations, where an effective content strategy was created, with objectives and a defined audience. The production times and process were excellent. It is a pleasure to recommend his great work and I hope to have the opportunity to collaborate with him again.
items.t3: Excellent professional with great creativity and commitment to the client!
items.t4: He is one of the best professionals for audiovisual media coverage related to tourism; the quality of his work, the speed of delivery, and his knowledge of the sector make him unique.
items.t5: I worked with Martín directly on events and some promotions and it is not only a pleasure but he is a professional who knows how to provide the exact advice so that things turn out exceptionally. I have also seen his work indirectly in reels or promotional videos and I must highlight the originality he handles in everything he does.
items.t6: We have hired Martin Magariños to cover photo and video for different projects like Commercial Expos, Product Launches, Trips, Plant Inaugurations, etc., very diverse jobs in which he always provided a 'cinematic' look accompanying the event's narrative. He always shares creative proposals and adds an extra touch to all coverage with the drone. We would choose him ALWAYS!!
items.t7: The best provider I have worked with in years. We met in 2020 and since then for every event I need audiovisual coverage I call him. His team is also impeccable.
